name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M40995 [Premium Enhanced Version] Genuine Italian A-grade diamond quilted leather from the official factory, counter-synced chip technology. Focuses on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, and oil edges. A-grade high-quality output, fully upgraded. Photos match the product. Full packaging included. Dimensions: 32*29*17CM
